raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Akas weens besdeeewigs Rehninsch pahr Ju-
du : 1. Leek jawu Dehlu zaur Ugguni eet . 3.
Tohp no teem Sihrereemfohti spaidshts : 5.
Mekie Pali dsibu pee ta Rehniza no Afiri-
jas : 7. Leek weenu jaunu Altari Jerusaleme
ustaifht : 10 Mirſt/ un winna Dehls Jeſki,
iustohip par Rehninu winna Weeta : 20.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Eptita padejunita Gad-
da Pekaüſa Reinalijus
Debla/tappe Akas Jo-
tama ta Rehniza no Juwda
Dehls par Rehnizu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Diwidefmits Gaddus wez-
bija Akas/ kad wiꞥſch par Rehni-
nu tappe/ un waldija feſchpadef-
mits Gaddus Jerusaleme/ un ne
darrtija/ kas tam KUNGAM fa-
wain Deewam patikke/ ittin ka
winna Tehws Dahwids.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo wiꞥſch staigaja us to
Israëta Rehnizu Zelteeim.
Wiꞥſch likke arridsan jawu Deh-
lu zaur Ugguni eet/ pehz to Pa-
garnu Negantibahm / ko tas
KUNGS Israëta Behrnu
Preekſcha bij isdsinnis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch uppureja un kweh-
pinaja arridsan us Angstumeem
un Pakalneem/ un appafsch wiꞥ-
feem falteem Robkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zebſehs Rezins tas Sihr-
reun Rehninsch ar Pekaüſu Reina-
lijus Dehlu/ to Israëta Rehninsu
us Jerusalemi Karrâ / un tee
mette Lehgeri apkahrt Akasii/
bet tee ne warreja to pahrwarreht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tanni Latka atdabbuja
Rezins tas Sihreru Rehninsch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Akas fuhttija Wehſt-
neschus us Tiglat Pileſteru to
Affireeu Rehnizu / un likke fiz-
ziht: Es efmu taws Kalps un
taws Dehls/ nahz angſcham / un
atpeſti mann no to Sihreru Reh-
niza Rohkas/ un no ta Israëta
Rehninsa Rohkas/ kas pretti mañ
zehlutchees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Akas nehme to Sudra-
bu un Seltu/kas eekſch ta KUN-
GA Namma/ un eekſch ta Reh-
nina Namma Mantahm atrasts
ktua/ un fuhtija tam Affireeu
Rehninsam Dahwanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Affireeu Rehninsch
paklausija tam/ un tas Affireeu
Rehninsch zehlahs angſcham us
Damasku/ un uſnehme to / un
aiswedde tohs ( Ledſihwota-
jus ) uhs Kiru/ un nokawe Die-
zinu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zebſehs tas Rehninsch
Akas Tiglat Pileſteram tam Af-
fireeu Rehninsam pretti us Da-
masku. Un redseja tur weenu
Altari/ kas Damaskusa btja/ un
tas Rehninsch Akas fuhtija tam
Preesteram Urijasam ta Altara
Sihrni/ un winna Lihdsibu/ wiſ-
faschki ta/ ka tas bija darrhts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Preesteris Urijas
ustaifija tahdu Altari/ ittin tah-
du/ kahdu tas Rehninsch Akas
no Damaskus bij fuhtijs/ ta dar-
rija tas Preesteris Urijas/ kamehr
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
